name: s3
context: AWS S3 object storage — upload, download, list, and manage buckets and objects
info: Full S3 operations: create/delete buckets, upload/download objects, set ACLs, configure lifecycle policies, enable versioning, generate presigned URLs. Supports multipart uploads for large files and server-side encryption.

scripts.name: Upload Object
scripts.description: Upload a file to an S3 bucket

scripts.name: List Objects
scripts.description: List objects in an S3 bucket

author: dojo-community
